title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif from Cursor interviews Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, on scaling infrastructure at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies every 15 years, and hiring top infrastructure engineers in the AI era. The conversation covers engineering principles from high-scale systems, the role of AI coding agents, and the future direction of database technology.
